assertions.text: All relevant clearance categories identified based on the content description
High-risk items are flagged explicitly with a risk note
Checklist distinguishes between clearances the producer can handle and those requiring legal counsel

categories-identified.note: All categories identified: talent, archive, music (sync+master), photos, location, branded items

high-risk-flagged.note: Popular songs and 1970s TV archive footage flagged as HIGH RISK

legal-vs-producer.note: Music clearance and archive TV footage directed to legal; talent releases marked as producer-handleable

categories-identified.note: Two categories identified: interview releases and royalty-free music licence verification

high-risk-flagged.note: No high-risk items — royalty-free library flagged as low risk but verify terms

legal-vs-producer.note: Both items marked as producer-handleable; no legal counsel needed

categories-identified.note: All categories identified including post-reunification rights uncertainty and heritage building

high-risk-flagged.note: East German studio archive rights and deceased artist paintings flagged HIGH RISK

legal-vs-producer.note: Archive rights and artist estate directed to German entertainment lawyer; Bundesarchiv photos marked as producer-handleable
